title: Synthesus Character Bio
description: Required identity file for every Synthesus character genome. Defines who the character IS.

character_id.description: Unique snake_case identifier. Must match the directory name under characters/.

name.description: Display name shown to players (e.g., 'Garen Ironfoot', 'Haven').

display_name.description: Optional alternate display name. Defaults to 'name' if omitted.

version.description: Semantic version of this character genome (e.g., '1.0.0').

hemisphere_id.description: Unique numeric ID for kernel routing. Ranges: 1-99 core, 100-199 marketplace, 200-255 enterprise.

status.description: Deployment status. Only 'active' characters are loaded by the server.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the character's role and personality.

tone.description: Comma-separated tone descriptors (e.g., 'warm, shrewd, direct with a touch of humor').

archetype.description: Built-in personality archetype. Used as fallback when no personality.json exists. Defaults to character type if omitted.

knowledge_domains.description: List of knowledge domain tags this character covers.

setting.description: Optional world-building context for the character.

location.description: Where this NPC lives/works (e.g., 'Ironhaven, Ironfoot's Emporium').

era.description: Time period or world era (e.g., 'medieval fantasy', 'modern', 'sci-fi').

immutable_core.description: Non-negotiable behavioral rules. Character MUST obey these regardless of player input.

non_negotiables.description: Hard rules the character must never violate.

metacognition.description: Self-awareness rules: what the character knows about itself.

disclosure.description: What the character says when asked what it is.

id.description: Legacy alias for character_id. Deprecated — use character_id.
